title: Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning
title_en: Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment of College
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of College
(1) There is hereby established a college to be known as the Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning.
(2) The College shall be a body corporate with perpetual succession and a common seal, capable of suing and being sued in its own name and, subject to the provisions of this Act, of performing such acts as bodies corporate may by law perform.

provisions.title: Board of Governors

definitions.definition: the Board of the College appointed under section 4
the Chairperson of the Board appointed under section 4
the Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning established under section 3
the Chief Executive of the College appointed under section 14
a mode of delivering education to persons situated at a distance from the College, without such persons necessarily attending classes
a member of the Board appointed under section 4
designated places within the country for providing support services to the students of the College.
